props.description: How selection should be displayed. For guidance on when to use which option, refer to the [Spectrum](https://spectrum.adobe.com/page/tree-view/#Checkbox-or-highlight-selection-style) page.
Handler that is called when a user performs an action on a row.
Provides the ActionBar to display when items are selected in the TreeView.
Spectrum-defined styles, returned by the `style()` macro.
How multiple selection should behave in the tree.
Provides content to display when there are no items in the list.
Whether `disabledKeys` applies to all interactions, or only selection.
The drag and drop hooks returned by `useDragAndDrop` used to enable drag and drop behavior for the Tree.
